hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.env$ ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ \.env\.local\.secrets$ ]]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️ secrets file — blocked from reading", "continue": false}'; exit 1; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.env$ ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ \.env\.local\.secrets$ ]]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️ secrets file — blocked from editing", "continue": false}'; exit 1; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.env$ ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ \.env\.local\.secrets$ ]]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️ secrets file — blocked from writing", "continue": false}'; exit 1; fi; exit 0

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); case "$CMD" in *'--step caption'*|*'--step embed'*) case "$CMD" in *'--limit'*) ;; *) echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️  Indexer running without --limit. This will hit all photos and cost money. Use --limit to test first.", "continue": true}'; ;; esac ;; esac; exit 0

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ /app/ ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ ^app/ ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run pytest --no-header -q 2>/dev/null || true; fi; exit 0
